en.llmResponsePharsingErrorMessage: Something went wrong. Please try again.
en.llmSendMessageError: Sorry, there was a technical error. Please try again.
en.llmTransferToAgentFallbackMessage: Let me transfer you to the next available agent
en.noAgentsAvailableMessage: Sorry, we're unable to connect you to an agent right now. You can reach us directly:

closeChatTextFields.title: Are you sure you want to exit the chat?
closeChatTextFields.body: The window will be minimized and your session will be saved automatically. You may resume at any time within the next 45 minutes. To end the session, please click End Chat from the menu dropdown

disclaimerTextFields.title: Welcome To ABB Chatbot
disclaimerTextFields.gdprConscent: By using this chat, you acknowledge that your interactions may be monitored and recorded for security, quality assurance, and service improvement purposes. Personal data may be processed in accordance with our [Privacy Statement](https://www.abb.com/global/en/company/privacy-notice/external-stakeholders).
disclaimerTextFields.marketingConscent: I consent to receive offers and news on products, services and events from ABB in accordance with ABB's Privacy Policy
disclaimerTextFields.note: Note: I am powered by AI. Before using AI results, verify accuracy and completeness

startupChatMessages: Hi! I am a virtual assistant
Please describe your request in detail and we will support you
